name: Get Learning Key
query: SELECT TOP 1 scl.[Key] AS LearningKey FROM ShortCourseLearning scl INNER JOIN Learner l ON l.[Key] = scl.[LearnerKey] INNER JOIN ShortCourseEpisode sce ON sce.[LearningKey] = scl.[Key] WHERE l.Uln = 23456734 AND sce.UKPRN = 10005077 AND sce.TrainingCode = 'ZSC00001' AND sce.StartDate = '2025-08-01'
